articles.title: SEC approves options on spot Ether ETFs
SEC Approves Options Trading on Spot $ETH ETFs
Bitcoin $100K target ‘back on table’ after Trump tariff pause supercharges market sentiment
articles.description: Bitcoin (BTC) staged a sharp rebound after US President Donald Trump announced a pause on tariffs for non-retaliating countries, reigniting bullish momentum and raising hopes for a potential surge toward the $100,000 mark. On April 9, BTC/USD surged by approximately 9%, reversing most of the losses it incurred earlier in the week, to retest $83,000. In doing so, the pair came closer to validating a falling wedge pattern that has been forming on its daily chart since December 2024. A falling wedg

articles.title: SEC greenlights options trading on spot Ethereum ETFs including ones from BlackRock, Bitwise and Grayscale
articles.description: The SEC has approved options trading on spot Ethereum exchange-traded funds for BlackRock, Grayscale and Bitwise.

articles.title: Breaking: Bitcoin Soars 5% on Tariff Reversal
articles.description: Risk assets have soared after the U. S. announced a 90-day pause on all tariffs

articles.title: China and Russia are using Bitcoin to settle energy trades
articles.description: China and Russia are now using Bitcoin to pay for energy deals, according to VanEck. This comes as Donald Trump hits China and the EU with new tariffs, announced on April 2, sending Bitcoin briefly down from $85,000 to $81,000. By the weekend, it dropped even more. But even with that slide, Bitcoin still beat […]

articles.title: $120 Billion VanEck Confirms China and Russia Use Bitcoin for Energy Trades Amid Sanctions
articles.description: VanEck, an asset management firm with $120 billion under management, has confirmed that China and Russia are now settling energy trades using Bitcoin

articles.title: Immutable Will Combine Its Ethereum Gaming Networks Into One
articles.description: The original Immutable X network will be folded into the newer Immutable zkEVM later this year, with assets being automatically migrated.

articles.title: MELANIA Holders Left Reeling as Team Offloads $30M in Tokens
articles.description:
Melania Trump’s meme coin, MELANIA, has plummeted in value amid a $30 million token sell-off from team wallets, raising concerns about transparency.

The post MELANIA Holders Left Reeling as Team Offloads $30M in Tokens first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: Argentina Opens Investigation Into President Milei’s Role in LIBRA Token Crash
articles.description: TL;DR Congress Investigates LIBRA Crash: Argentina’s Congress has launched a bipartisan probe into President Milei’s alleged role in the LIBRA token’s rise and catastrophic 90% crash. Allegations of Fraud: Experts label the crash a “rug-pull,” with lawsuits accusing Milei and others of inflating LIBRA’s value before its sudden collapse. Political and Regulatory Implications: The scandal.

articles.title: Trump-linked WLFI dumps Ethereum at 55% loss amid crypto market turmoil
articles.description: 9-4-2025 – World Liberty Financial Inc. (WLFI), a venture tied to a Trump-aligned outfit, has offloaded a hefty tranche of Ethereum, swallowing a staggering loss of nearly 55%. articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Whales Capitulate: Is It Over?
articles.description: Ethereum whales will not keep it up with price drops
